PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court ordered the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary off calendar for the petitioner's failure to appear and failure to clear the probate examiner's notes.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cristobal. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Continued To Jan-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Wendy Finney-Hemphill, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

Petitioner reports as to the status of the Estate. The court confirms with Petitioner that she has not seen notes from the assigned Examiner and therefore is not aware of the several issues with her petition. Petitioner is provided with the Examiner's notes in open court.

The matter is continued to Jan-24-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Petitioner in propria persona Wendy Finney-Hemphill to appear on Dec-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the Examiner's notes have not been addressed and why the court should not take the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary off calendar. The Petition is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Yang. Not Reported.
